purpose: Help the user work through a large unread inbox sender-by-sender, surfacing volume stats and the most useful action per sender group.
primaryUserGoal: Process unread email in bulk by focusing on one sender group at a time.
whenHermesShouldChoose: User asks to triage or clean up their inbox, wants to review unread, or asks to group/process email by sender.
goodFor: Working through a backlog of unread email
Extracting action items from a busy inbox
supports: Top-of-view stats (unread count, action items, sender count)
Grouped list of senders on the left
Detail panel on the right for the selected sender
Bulk archive / mark read actions per group
idealDataShape: Sender groups with per-sender thread counts and one-line subjects
Per-sender detail with subjects, timestamps, and suggested next action

populationInstructions.summary: Populate stats with headline counts, then a split with a grouped sender list on the left and a detail-panel for the currently-selected sender on the right. Group senders by type (work, notifications, marketing, newsletters) with tone-coded group headers.
steps: Compute top-level stats: total unread, action items needed, number of distinct senders, and the oldest unread age.
Group senders into 3-5 buckets by type (Work, GitHub / tool notifications, Newsletters, Marketing, Personal).
Tone-code groups: danger for action items, warning for work, neutral for the rest.
Pick one sender as the initial selection and populate the detail-panel with subject lines and the suggested action.
In the detail-panel, include fields for thread count, last received time, and whether auto-archive is safe.
Avoid PII in the summary — use sender names only, not message bodies.
guardrails: Never include the full body of a message — only subject lines.
Don't invent sender volumes — derive them from real inbox counts.
Don't mark a newsletter group as 'action items'.

patchPrefer: Use upsert_groups to refresh individual sender groups after an action
Use set_detail to switch the right-hand panel when the user picks a different sender
Use set_status when a bulk archive completes
replaceTriggers: User asks for a fresh inbox scan
User changes the time window significantly
